channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] I'm #now_listening_to "Show Them" by BAND-MAID with The Warning

item.title: [BlueSky] I could name a bunch of Bloodywood songs, but those often have English sectio...
item.dc:creator: AZ Obsesses (azobsesses.bsky.social)
item.description:
I could name a bunch of Bloodywood songs, but those often have English sections. “Fate” by BAND-MAID also has English bits.

So I have to go with this.

youtu.be/1lfb-280MhU?...

BlueSky · azobsesses.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] KANAMI: The theme here is “circus”. We had finished the album, but then SAIKI...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
KANAMI: The theme here is “circus”. We had finished the album, but then SAIKI mentioned that a BAND-MAID record isn’t complete without an instrumental. Composing this made me feel like we found the missing piece to a puzzle.

MIKU & SAIKI: The title is all about climbing higher, even still. We can d

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] mora ハイレゾランキング［2026.6.23 – 29］今週の1位はYOASOBI！Michael Jackson、Hollywood Movie W...
item.dc:creator: MAGMOE (magmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
mora ハイレゾランキング［2026.6.23 – 29］今週の1位はYOASOBI！Michael Jackson、Hollywood Movie Works、mora Acousticの人気作に、Hiromitsu Kitayama、BAND-MAID、SUPER BEAVER、竹達彩奈、Museの新譜もランクイン！

https://www.magmoe.com/3079261/movie/2026-07-06/

今週の１位は、YOASOBIの“読むCD”としてシリーズ化してきたEPの4作目が獲得！2位には、映画公開で話題のMichael …

BlueSky · magmoe.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] https://sakurajima.moe/tags/WordWeavers 7.1 — If your MC wore tee shirts, wha...
item.dc:creator: NaraMoore ⛩️👻八尺様👻⛩️ at Fedi (NaraMoore@sakurajima.moe)
item.description:
https://sakurajima.moe/tags/WordWeavers 7.1 — If your MC wore tee shirts, what would be on their favorite one?

T-shirs are cool with my characters.

Arisu. ins https://sakurajima.moe/tags/SakuraTrick t.So here is Kao in a https://sakurajima.moe/tags/BandMaid t.Kao in a https://sakurajima.moe/tags/IsTheOrderARabbit? (https://sakurajima.moe/tags/GochiUsa) t.Kao in a "Cute is Justice" t.Kao in a https://sakurajima.moe/tags/BandMaid thttps://sakurajima.moe/tags/NMWW https://sakurajima.moe/tags/NMPrompts

Mastodon · NaraMoore@sakurajima.moe

item.title: [BlueSky] Coming soon
item.dc:creator: LeScottLePalmr (lescottlepslmer.bsky.social)
item.description:
Coming soon

South Park Man Pile on Tour.

Tom Araya, Kid Rock, Gene Simmons, Zoltan Bathory, Blackie Lawless, Aron Lewis, Vanilla Ice and more.
With Morgan Wallen to yell " Dey Terk Ar Jerbs"

Outside any concert The Warning, Hanabie, Band Maid etc are playing.

Tickets on sale at Ticketmaster

BlueSky · lescottlepslmer.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] It's interesting that the Japanese female rock bands have had this attitude f...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's interesting that the Japanese female rock bands have had this attitude forever, they aren't rivals, they are all young women pursuing their best life in the same industry, and they attend each other's shows, and are happy for everyone's successes. Even working with bands from other countries.

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 😆 Love it! Newest Band-Maid video, Energetic, has them all sitting around a ...
item.dc:creator: Deadling (deadling.bsky.social)
item.description:
😆 Love it! Newest Band-Maid video, Energetic, has them all sitting around a table. Sipping tea, eating sweets. Then there's Misa, slamming a bottle of liquor!
😏

item.description:
‪CatFreak‬ @catfreak.bsky.social‬

#LookAndSee 447
#MusicChallenge
#MusicSky
This is just for fun! No rules. I will post a pic often for your music association… 🎧

#LookAndSee (Day 447) 🎶

Band-Maid "Freedom"
youtu.be/FHpuEqMAcDg?...

BlueSky · neilcam57.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 🎥 Our REACTION is live! BAND-MAID’s “Choose Me” hits with powerful rock ener...
item.dc:creator: AngelTalion (angeltalion.bsky.social)
item.description:
🎥 Our REACTION is live! BAND-MAID’s “Choose Me” hits with powerful rock energy, but the vocals glide right through it with so much control and confidence.

What detail made you want to hit rewind?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E3SRjKFh7TI&list=PL7MzXPGtHwvCpOtbZmSz5FAt_oLkjooMn

BlueSky · angeltalion.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] overseas masters and daughters who study Japanese and learn kanji (Chinese ch...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
overseas masters and daughters who study Japanese and learn kanji (Chinese characters) from BAND-MAID lyrics.

SAIKI Kobato herself is studying too. She finds things from movies, manga, and many other places.

Kobato I learned the word "indefinite precept" from a comic book.

SAIKI What manga was i

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Anyway I am still waiting for Band Maid to release their October dates for th...
item.dc:creator: Steve Stevers (stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com)
item.description:
Anyway I am still waiting for Band Maid to release their October dates for the NA part of their world tour and it is killing me

BlueSky · stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com

item.title: [BlueSky] The warning son la caña y super jóvenes, así que van a dar guerra mucho tiemp...
item.dc:creator: Pablo Bouzada (pbousan.rocks)
item.description:
The warning son la caña y super jóvenes, así que van a dar guerra mucho tiempo 🤟 Las encontré escuchando bandazas (te lo copio) de rock/metal japones, todo mujeres: Band-maid, Lovebites, Nemophila. Y de bola extra, Gacharic Spin, que es una banda más ecléctica pero musicalmente brutales.

BlueSky · pbousan.rocks

item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)

Album: New Beginning
Release: 11/17/2015

Lyrics: 川島だりあ [Kawashima, Daria]
Arrangement: 山口篤 [Yamaguchi, Atsushi] 倉田冬樹 [Kurata, Fuyuki] spinstealthspike
1st Live:6/20/2015
#bandmaid

item.title: [BlueSky] Ended the first half of 2026 by listening to multiple recommendations, explor...
item.dc:creator: Kikoman589 ☀️ (kikoman589.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ended the first half of 2026 by listening to multiple recommendations, exploring more releases from electronic artists I like and diving into BAND-MAID before attending their concert. Really enjoyable all around. Lots of bangers.

BlueSky · kikoman589.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] planning this trip is reinforcing my habits to solo travel because missing yk...
item.dc:creator: Magitek (magitekelite.bsky.social)
item.description:
planning this trip is reinforcing my habits to solo travel because missing ykl vol 22 while in japan is pain
we couldve made band maid tour fukuoka leg but they werent interested and when i decided to just solo it and checked again just now theyre sold out whoops

BlueSky · magitekelite.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] over, in this case, we wanted to make something that emphasized melody, and o...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
over, in this case, we wanted to make something that emphasized melody, and on top of that, we wanted the background sound to be playful, without being too technical, and we thought that by doing that, we could create something that was typical of BAND-MAID. We made it with the hope that it would li

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] akes it different from when we simply try to make a new song for BAND-MAID; r...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
akes it different from when we simply try to make a new song for BAND-MAID; rather, our approach is "Let's make a song that fits this anime, in a way that's typical of BAND-MAID." In that sense, the fundamental aspects of how we make the song change a bit, and something new is born as a result. More

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] nd it ended up being composed almost entirely of fills. That kind of composit...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
nd it ended up being composed almost entirely of fills. That kind of composition itself is quite new to me. The approach of connecting eight bars with fills without beating the beat is quite rare for BAND-MAID, and it might have been the first time we connected such a long and playful phrase. I feel

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] るりちゃん！🍆🙏💕
item.dc:creator: さいぺんパパ (cyberpenguin.jp)
item.description:
るりちゃん！🍆🙏💕
3,000再生！
おめでとうございます！！！
🎉🎉🎊🎊㊗️🎊🎊🎉🎉
(๑>◡<๑)b
#再生回数お祝いの記録
#焔魔るり

【 ログ・ホライゾン 円卓崩壊 OP 】Different/BAND-MAID 歌ってみた【 vsinger 焔魔るり 】# えんまの夏祭り -8月毎日投稿中- # shorts

BlueSky · cyberpenguin.jp

item.title: [BlueSky] My favourite Band Maid album, I should clarify.

item.description:
My favourite Band Maid album, I should clarify.

item.title: [BlueSky] two people and that’s why it gave an unusual impression for a BAND-MAID song,...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
two people and that’s why it gave an unusual impression for a BAND-MAID song, I think.

Saiki: The song was the first recorded, but it was fun because I was singing in line with my image in the band. I wonder if they made it closer to that world view when they arranged it. Many BAND-MAID songs in t

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] — Of BAND-MAID 's songs are based on hard rock and Rock & Roll there are many...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— Of BAND-MAID 's songs are based on hard rock and Rock & Roll there are many upbeat numbers, but this song is a mid-tempo tune with intensity.

Misa: We wanted to increase the number of songs not typical of BAND-MAID, but this is especially true of "Awkward".

Miku: It is Misa’s favourite song, isn

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] ⛩️The Singularity Is Nigh, aber vorher kommt BAND-MAID mit ENERGETIC
item.dc:creator: SvenTetzlaff （翁 辞文） (sventetzlaff.literatur.social.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
⛩️The Singularity Is Nigh, aber vorher kommt BAND-MAID mit ENERGETIC

LALALA LALALA LALALA ... 🤪

BAND-MAID hatte gerade eine Tour in Europe:
BERLIN, COLUMBIA THEATER
FRANKFURT, BATSCHKAPP
MUNICH, TECHNIKUM
PARIS, BATACLAN
LONDON, ELECTRIC BRIXTON
Alle Konzerte waren restlos ausverkauft. 😎 […]

BlueSky · sventetzlaff.literatur.social.ap.brid.gy

item.title: [BlueSky] My copy of the new Band-Maid single, Energetic, arrived last week but I could...
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
My copy of the new Band-Maid single, Energetic, arrived last week but I couldn't enjoy it due to my knackered back.

I feel like today is the day to open it up and put it on repeat for a while.

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Hey Band-Maid
item.dc:creator: Chi Nerd (mimikute.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey Band-Maid
There is a real family behind these words, not just another post on your screen. Their story deserves to be seen. If you have a moment, please visit my page and read the pinned post. 🙏

item.title: [BlueSky] AFAIK, Band Maid's only cover. I LOVE this track. The (killer) main riff and ...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
AFAIK, Band Maid's only cover. I LOVE this track. The (killer) main riff and general melody are faithful, but Akane adds a lot to the drums and Kanami's solo is original.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as a bonus track on the WORLD DOMINATION album. Played live once on 12/20/2017 at Rensa in Sendai when Band-Maid, Roach, and Hysteric Panic opened for MUCC. MUCC also later played the song and Saiki joined them on stage. (The

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social
